sections.heading: In these Regulations, unless the context otherwise requires- Interpretation
sections.text:
"Registrar" means the Registrar of Co-operatives appointed
under section six;
" co-operative " means any enterprise or organisation owned
collectively by its members and managed for their joint
socio-economic benefit and whose activities are not pro­
hibited by law; and
"co-operative society" means a co-operative registered under
this Act as a co-operative society.
